intake.user_request: Migrate 10+ active importers off deprecated src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts to src/pipeline/graph-builder.ts (IMP-CORE-094, STUB-309)

classification.plan_type_rationale: Stub category=refactor maps to strict plan. 14 active importers across 5 layers; structurally incompatible schemas (Map-based DependencyGraph vs ExportedGraph); requires phased migration with per-consumer adaptation and regression testing.

warnings: Legacy schema (Map-based DependencyGraph) incompatible with pipeline ExportedGraph — consumers cannot be trivially switched; each requires individual adaptation

errors: skipped: using discovery grep output instead of .coderef scan

in_scope: src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts — source under migration (to be deleted at end)
14 active importer files across adapter, context, export, integration/rag, plugins, query layers
out_of_scope: Test files (update imports only if tests break)

constraints: All 14 consumers must compile cleanly after migration
Existing vitest test suite must pass (no new failures)
src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts must be deleted only after all imports are cleared
Do not change pipeline/graph-builder.ts implementation — only route consumers to it or to appropriate adapter shims
